## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? 1-3 bullet points. -->

-

## Type of change

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] refactor: Code restructuring
- [ ] docs: Documentation
- [ ] chore: Dependencies, tooling, CI
- [ ] test: Tests

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's naming and style conventions
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks pass (prettier + eslint)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in the code
- [ ] Documentation updated if API behavior changed
